message:
test: add 7 more conformance fixtures for flowchart, C4, requirement, quadrant, packet, architecture, kanban

Expands conformance test coverage from 15 to 22 diagram types. Now
covers all major diagram families including C4 architecture diagrams,
requirement diagrams, quadrant charts, packet diagrams, architecture
diagrams, and kanban boards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+architecture-beta
+    group api(cloud)[API Layer]
+    service gateway(server)[Gateway] in api
+    service auth(lock)[Auth] in api
+    gateway:R --> L:auth

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+C4Context
+    title System Context diagram
+    Person(user, "User", "A person using the system")
+    System(system, "Main System", "The main application")
+    System_Ext(email, "Email System", "Sends emails")
+    Rel(user, system, "Uses")
+    Rel(system, email, "Sends emails via")

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+flowchart TD
+    A[Start] --> B{Decision}
+    B -->|Yes| C[Action 1]
+    B -->|No| D[Action 2]
+    C --> E[End]
+    D --> E

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+kanban
+    column todo[To Do]
+    column doing[In Progress]
+    column done[Done]
+    task1[Task 1] in todo
+    task2[Task 2] in doing
+    task3[Task 3] in done

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+quadrantChart
+    title Priority Matrix
+    x-axis Low Effort --> High Effort
+    y-axis Low Impact --> High Impact
+    quadrant-1 Quick wins
+    quadrant-2 Major projects
+    quadrant-3 Fill-ins
+    quadrant-4 Thankless tasks
+    Item A: [0.2, 0.8]
+    Item B: [0.7, 0.9]
+    Item C: [0.3, 0.3]

@@ -480,5 +480,183 @@
         "merge develop"
       ]
     }
+  },

+    "id": "flowchart_basic",
